title: Knowledge Representation Path
description: Build fluency in Knowledge Representation inside AI Applications by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Knowledge Graph
steps.summary: Knowledge Graph belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Applications / Knowledge Representation. Start after Graph. It opens into Knowledge Graph Rules and Knowledge Graph Memory.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fuzzy Systems
steps.summary: Fuzzy Systems belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Applications / Knowledge Representation. Compare it with Semantic Web and Knowledge Graphs. It opens into Sugeno Fuzzy System and Mamdani Fuzzy System.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Knowledge Graphs
steps.summary: Knowledge Graphs belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Applications / Knowledge Representation. Compare it with Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web. It opens into Embodied Knowledge Graphs and probabilistic knowledge graphs.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Semantic Web
steps.summary: Semantic Web belongs to the AI Applications area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Applications / Knowledge Representation. Start after Semantic Network.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
